^2 = GameID: CUSA28101,CUSA28100,CUSA28317
^3 = NAME: Kitaria Fables
^SECONDLAYER: YES
^4 = FILE: kitariafables\[0-9]+.dat
+Item Amount MOD{{<div class="note"><h4>NOTE</h4><ul class="bullet-list"><li>Select the exact item/stack you want to modify and note its current quantity.</li><li>Use a step-up method to raise the amount safely while the code is active.</li><li>If you have <strong>1–9</strong>, set <em>Amount</em> to <code>9</code>, pick up one in-game, then set to <code>99</code>.</li><li>If you have <strong>10–99</strong>, set to <code>99</code>, pick up one, then set to <code>999</code>.</li><li>If you have <strong>100–999</strong>, set to <code>999</code> (and so on, increasing the max per digit length).</li><li>Apply the code while the target item is selected/highlighted.</li></ul></div>}}
%Credits: uncharteddk
